allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; cases=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''''Total: {len\(cases\)} cases''''\); intents=[c[''''expected_intent''''] for c in cases]; from collections import Counter; print\(Counter\(intents\).most_common\(20\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import json; cases=json.load\(open\(''tests/test_cases.json''\)\); print\(f''Total: {len\(cases\)} cases''\); from collections import Counter; print\(Counter\(c[''expected_intent''] for c in cases\).most_common\(25\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import json; cases=json.load\(open\(''tests/test_cases.json'', encoding=''utf-8''\)\); print\(f''Total: {len\(cases\)} cases''\); from collections import Counter; print\(Counter\(c[''expected_intent''] for c in cases\).most_common\(25\)\)")
